userPrompt: Hold any sales order over $25,000 until a supervisor releases it in P21
outline: Rule should trigger on order total; set hold or queue for supervisor release; log customer and order id.
p21Notes: Align with your hold codes and order-entry window; test in non-prod first.

userPrompt: Block shipment if the customer is over their credit limit on open AR
outline: Evaluate open AR vs credit limit; message or hold; may reference OrderCreditCheck-style checks.
p21Notes: See bundle examples for credit patterns; confirm company/branch rules.

userPrompt: When the user enters a discount percent on the order header, add or update an other-charge line for ORDER DISCOUNT
outline: On-demand button → add line item or update unit price; multi-row aware.
p21Notes: Similar to AddNewRowForDiscount-style rules; validate item master for other charge SKU.

userPrompt: Prevent certain roles from editing cost fields on purchase orders
outline: Field-level rule by role/company; suppress or lock on change.
p21Notes: Field protector patterns in bundle; map to your security groups.

userPrompt: Require a shipping route before the user can save the order
outline: Validate before commit; clear message if missing.
p21Notes: Require_Route patterns; confirm trigger (before save vs on demand).

userPrompt: Show a custom message when expedite date is set but the line is not expeditable
outline: Message handler or suppressor; conditional display.
p21Notes: Message handler examples in bundle; test message codes.
